segments.text: Official: Hello, Tourist Information Centre, Mike speaking, how can I help you?
segments.translation: 工作人员：您好，这里是游客信息中心，为您解答的是迈克，请问您需要什么帮助？

segments.text: Woman: Oh, hi. I wanted to find out about cookery classes.
segments.translation: 女士：嗨。我想了解一下烹饪班。

segments.text: I believe there are some one-day classes for tourists?
segments.translation: 我想您这应该为游客提供一天的课程？

segments.text: Official: Well, they're open to everyone, but tourists are always welcome.
segments.translation: 工作人员：嗯，课程是向所有人开放的，游客当然是受欢迎的。

segments.text: OK, let me give you some details of what's available.
segments.translation: 好的，让我来给您介绍一下现有课程的详细信息。

segments.text: There are several classes.
segments.translation: 我们提供多种烹饪课程。

segments.text: One very popular one is at the Food Studio.
segments.translation: 在美食工作室的课程非常受欢迎。

segments.text: Woman: OK.
segments.translation: 女士：好的。

segments.text: Official: They focus on seasonal products, and as well as teaching you how to cook them, they also show you how to choose them.
segments.translation: 工作人员：他们专注于季节性食材，并教你如何烹饪，他们还会告诉你如何选择食材。

segments.text: Woman: Right, that sounds good.
segments.translation: 女士：嗯，听起来不错。

segments.text: How big are the classes?
segments.translation: 烹饪课的班型多大呢？

segments.text: Official: I'm not sure exactly, but they'll be quite small.
segments.translation: 工作人员：具体人数还不确定，但班级人数会很少。

segments.text: Woman: And could I get a private lesson there?
segments.translation: 女士：我可以在那里上私人课程吗？

segments.text: Official: I think so ... let me check, yes, they do offer those.
segments.translation: 工作人员：我想可以的……让我查询一下，是的，他们确实提供了这些课程。

segments.text: Though in fact most of the people who attend the classes find it's a nice way of getting to know one another.
segments.translation: 事实上，大多数参加课程的人都认为这是一种了解彼此的好方法。

segments.text: Woman: I suppose it must be, yes.
segments.translation: 女士：我想一定是的。

segments.text: Official: And this company has a special deal for clients where they offer a discount of 20 percent if you return for a further class.
segments.translation: 工作人员：这家公司为客户提供特别优惠，如果您再次回来上课，可享受20%的折扣。

segments.text: Woman: OK. But you said there were several classes?
segments.translation: 女：好的。但您刚刚说会有好几个班？

segments.text: Official: That's right.
segments.translation: 工作人员：是的。

segments.text: Another one you might be interested in is Bond's Cookery School.
segments.translation: 另一个您可能感兴趣的班是邦德烹饪学校。

segments.text: They're quite new, they just opened six months ago, but I've heard good things about them.
segments.translation: 他们是新成立的，六个月前才开业，但我听说大家对它的评价都不错。

segments.text: They concentrate on teaching you to prepare healthy food, and they have quite a lot of specialist staff.
segments.translation: 他们专注于教你准备健康的食物，并且他们有很多专业人员。

segments.text: Woman: So is that food for people on a diet and things like that?
segments.translation: 女士：所以这些食物是为节食的人或有类似需求的人准备的吗？

segments.text: I don't know if I'd be interested in that.
segments.translation: 我不太确定这是不是我想要的。

segments.text: Official: Well, I don't think they particularly focus on low calorie diets or weight loss.
segments.translation: 工作人员：嗯，我认为他们并不是特别关注低卡路里饮食或减肥。

segments.text: It's more to do with recipes that look at specific needs, like including ingredients that will help build up your bones and make them stronger, that sort of thing.
segments.translation: 而是更多地做特定需求的食谱，比如食谱中加入了有助于骨骼生长和增强体质的食材。

segments.text: Woman: I see. Well, I might be interested, I'm not sure.
segments.translation: 女士：好的，我明白了。我可能会感兴趣的吧，但我还不确定。

segments.text: Do they have a website I could check?
segments.translation: 他们有没有可供查询的网站呢？

segments.text: Official: Yes, just key in the name of the school - it'll come up.
segments.translation: 工作人员：有的，只要输入学校名称，它就会出现。

segments.text: And if you want to know more about them, every Thursday evening they have a lecture at the school.
segments.translation: 如果你想了解更多关于他们的信息，每周四晚上他们都会在学校有讲座。

segments.text: It's free and you don't need to book or anything, just turn up at 7.30.
segments.translation: 这是免费的，并且你不需要预订或做任何事情，只需在7：30出席即可。

segments.text: And that might give you an idea of whether you want to go to an actual class.
segments.translation: 那可能会帮助你决定是否参加正式的课程。

segments.text: Official: OK, there's one more place you might be interested in.
segments.translation: 工作人员：好，还有一个您可能会感兴趣的地方。

segments.text: That's got a rather strange name, it's called The Arretsa Centre - that's spelled A-R-R-E-T-S-A.
segments.translation: 它有一个相当奇怪的名字，叫做Arretsa中心，拼写为A-R-R-E-T-S-A。

segments.text: Woman: OK.
segments.translation: 女士：嗯。

segments.text: Official: They've got a very good reputation.
segments.translation: 工作人员：他们有很好的声誉。

segments.text: They do a bit of meat and fish cookery but they mostly specialise in vegetarian dishes.
segments.translation: 他们会做一些肉类和鱼类的烹饪，但是他们的专长是做素食料理。

segments.text: Woman: Right. That's certainly an area I'd like to learn more about.
segments.translation: 女士：很好。这的确是我想多了解的领域。

segments.text: I've got lots of friends who don't eat meat.
segments.translation: 我有很多不吃肉的朋友。

segments.text: In fact, I think I might have seen that school today.
segments.translation: 事实上，我想我今天可能已经看到过这所学校了。

segments.text: Is it just by the market?
segments.translation: 它是在市场旁边？

segments.text: Official: That's right.
segments.translation: 工作人员：没错。

segments.text: So they don't have any problem getting their ingredients.
segments.translation: 所以他们可以便捷地购买食材。

segments.text: They're right next door.
segments.translation: 市场就在隔壁。

segments.text: And they also offer a special two-hour course in how to use a knife.
segments.translation: 他们还特别提供了一节两小时的课程来介绍如何使用刀具。

segments.text: They cover all the different skills - buying them, sharpening, chopping techniques.
segments.translation: 课程涵盖了各种技能——如何选购，如何磨刀，如何切丝。

segments.text: It gets booked up quickly though so you'd need to check it was available.
segments.translation: 这是一门很抢手的课，所以您需要查询它是否还能报名。

segments.text: Woman: Right, well thank you very much. I'll go and …
segments.translation: 女士：好，非常感谢您。我会去的......
